title: AI electricity cost sensitivity figure
unit: cents per token and power-cost sensitivity

title: Importer exposure matrix for Hormuz-linked products

refresh_rule: refresh after customs/cargo-flow data or new official stock allocation releases

title: Machine-readable crude importer adjustment figure data
refresh_rule: regenerate after f6r.5 updates

title: Crude importer adjustment figure
refresh_rule: regenerate after source table changes

title: Historical oil shock metric slice
unit: flow shares buffers price response and caveats
refresh_rule: refresh if historical denominators or price-deflator method changes

title: Historical route and shipping shock metric slice
unit: route exposure rerouting freight and caveats
refresh_rule: refresh if public freight insurance or traffic backfill data improves
notes: Subagent-collected route/shipping slice for RQ6; route cases are not directly comparable to physical oil supply losses and should be scored separately.

title: Current Hormuz multi-product metric slice
unit: exposed flow low/base/high disruption shares buffers and caveats
refresh_rule: refresh after RQ1/RQ2/RQ3/RQ4 scenario updates or observed disruption data
notes: Subagent-collected current-Hormuz slice for RQ6; product rows overlap and should not be summed without de-duplication.

title: Historical and current Hormuz comparison metric panel
unit: 24-column normalized evidence panel with provenance and caveats
refresh_rule: regenerate after any 4j7.3 slice changes or before final RQ6 charting
notes: Normalized union of oil shock, route shock, and current-Hormuz slices; supports 4j7.4 ranking while preserving source-slice provenance and missing values.

title: Historical shock case ranking scores
unit: dimension-level 0-4 scores weights ranks and caveats
refresh_rule: regenerate after 4j7.3 panel or scoring rubric changes
notes: First-pass transparent ranking table; combines historical analogues with current Hormuz headline/cost-channel rows and preserves NA values where current duration or price response is not observed.

title: Current Hormuz product ranking scores
unit: dimension-level 0-4 scores weights ranks and caveats
refresh_rule: regenerate after 4j7.3 current-Hormuz slice or scoring rubric changes
notes: First-pass product/channel scoring table; key result is LPG/NGL LNG and sulphur outrank the crude aggregate because bypass replacement and buffer evidence are weaker.

title: Historical shock comparison figure data
unit: normalized score and dimension-score fields for figure rendering
refresh_rule: regenerate with scripts/build_4j7_historical_comparison_chart.py after 4j7.4 score changes
notes: Machine-readable figure data for the RQ6 historical comparison matrix; includes comparison-case and Hormuz product/channel panels with confidence/caveat fields.

title: Historical shock comparison figure
unit: SVG comparison matrix with ranked severity and dimension scores
refresh_rule: regenerate with scripts/build_4j7_historical_comparison_chart.py after figure-data changes
notes: Publication SVG generated from 4j7.4 score tables; explicitly caveats route-vs-supply comparability current exposure/scenario status and non-additive product rows.
